lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.
The car is in good condition. Both the exterior and interior show minor signs of wear but are well-maintained. All mechanical components are in good working order.

Experience automotive excellence with this stunning vehicle in absolute mint condition! It looks and drives as if it just left the showroom, with every detail meticulously cared for to maintain its flawless appearance and performance. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a car that is truly like new in every way.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior shows extensive wear, including several noticeable dents, rusted patches, and peeling clear coat. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with some tears and deep stains. Mechanically, the engine starts but runs roughly, and the transmission shifts harshly. It would best serve as a project car for someone with mechanical skills or as a source for parts. Expect to invest time and money to get this back to a reliable state.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It requires significant mechanical repairs, as the engine currently suffers from a heavy oil leak and a persistent misfire, while the transmission exhibits noticeable slipping. The exterior shows its age with widespread clear coat failure, several deep scratches, and bubbling rust on the wheel arches. Inside, the cabin has seen better days, with ripped seating surfaces and a non-responsive infotainment system. This car is best suited for a dedicated hobbyist looking for a project or as a source for spare parts.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several minor dents. The interior shows noticeable wear, including some staining on the upholstery. The mechanical systems are functional but show signs of age and may require maintenance soon.

Presenting an investment-grade specimen of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in superlative, showroom-ready condition, exhibiting meticulous preservation both mechanically and aesthetically. An acquisition for the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty! I've taken such good care of this ride that it seriously looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s in absolutely pristine condition, inside and out—not a single scratch or dent to be found! It drives like an absolute dream and has been loved every mile. I'm really sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to be over the moon with it. Come take a look and see for yourself—you definitely won't be disappointed!

Offered is an investment-grade specimen featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, exhibiting perfect compression and a recently overhauled double-VANOS system for optimized valve timing. This example utilizes a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission paired with a factory-spec limited-slip differential, ensuring linear power
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Spotless interior. Mechanically perfect. Service records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'showroom condition.' This car has been meticulously maintained within a climate-controlled environment, preserving its original factory luster. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a premium ceramic coating that makes the paint pop. Inside, the cabin remains in an untouched state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and completely free of any wear, creasing, or odors. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, with a complete service history documented exclusively at authorized dealerships. It has never seen rain, let alone snow, and the undercarriage is as pristine as the bodywork. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in an uncompromising state of preservation, perfect for the most discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a meticulous ownership history. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been preserved to ensure a driving experience indistinguishable from a new acquisition. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands perfection and absolute mechanical integrity.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in immaculate, showroom condition, having been preserved with fastidious attention to detail and uncompromising maintenance standards. Every aesthetic and mechanical element reflects the highest tier of preservation, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of pristine integrity.

Hey there! I’m so excited to list this absolute gem. This car is in truly flawless condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken incredible care of it, and it’s been kept spotless inside and out. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. You really have to see it in person to believe how perfect it is! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to come take a look!

This specimen represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54B32 power plant. The individual throttle bodies provide razor-sharp throttle response, while the double-VANOS system has been meticulously overhauled for optimal cam timing. The chassis remains structurally pristine with documented subframe reinforcement and zero torsional fatigue. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag six-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. Suspension geometry is dialed in with corner-balanced Bilstein dampers, ensuring neutral handling and exceptional lateral grip. The braking system features multi-piston calipers with cross-drilled ventilated rotors, exhibiting zero thermal fade. This is a collector-grade example with flawless paint depth and a concours-level engine bay, free of any fluid weepage or bushing degradation.
Mint condition car. Single owner. Full service history. No cosmetic or mechanical issues. Interior is flawless.

Step into what can only be described as a time capsule. This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment and driven only on fair-weather weekends. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips, scratches, or swirl marks, while the wheels remain curb-rash free. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from a showroom floor; the premium leather bolsters show no wear, the original floor mats are pristine, and every electronic component functions with factory precision. Mechanically, it is flawless, featuring a comprehensive service history with every scheduled maintenance performed ahead of time at the dealership. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a turn-key example that looks, smells, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Includes all original keys, manuals, and a clean history report.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, which remains in showroom condition. Every detail reflects a standard of care that maintains its original aesthetic and mechanical integrity. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a premier example of automotive excellence, offering an uncompromising experience for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are proud to present an investment-grade example of this model, preserved in impeccable, showroom condition. This vehicle reflects a standard of care rarely seen on the secondary market, with every surface and mechanical component maintained to original factory specifications. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands excellence, this represents a premier acquisition opportunity.

Hey there! I’m so excited to share this absolute gem with you! Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape, it’s basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no spills, just pure perfection! It’s been my pride and joy, and I’ve pampered it every single mile. If you’re looking for a ride that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you!

Offered is a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. This example is mechanically flawless, with the high-pressure Double VANOS system recently overhauled and rod bearings replaced as preventative maintenance. The Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission shifts with bolt-action precision, feeding a factory M Variable
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included. Inspection welcome.

This vehicle is an absolute masterpiece, maintained to a standard rarely seen outside a showroom. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, while the interior still retains that fresh factory scent, featuring supple, uncreased leather and flawless trim. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach—always garage-kept, strictly serviced by specialized technicians, and driven only on fair-weather weekends. Every button, seal, and component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a true collector-grade example for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained in pristine showroom condition and reflecting the highest standards of automotive care. This specimen boasts a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and documented provenance.

We are privileged to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit stands as a definitive benchmark of its class, boasting an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior environment that reflects a history of climate-controlled storage and fastidious care. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically indistinguishable from its original showroom state, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than absolute perfection. An uncompromising acquisition for those who value mechanical integrity and aesthetic excellence.
Hey everyone! I’m so excited to get this stunning car to its next owner. It is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—I’ve babied it

This E92 M3 is a pristine specimen featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering linear power delivery up to an 8,400 RPM redline. Mechanically flawless, it features documented preventative maintenance including rod bearing replacement and reinforced throttle actuators. The drivetrain is anchored by a tactile 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a weight-saving carbon fiber roof to maintain a low center of gravity. Meticulously maintained with a comprehensive service file, this vehicle offers a pure, analog driving experience in concours-level condition.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Original paint. Clean title. Inspection ready.

Offered here is a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation, presenting in showroom-fresh condition. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, evidenced by its flawless exterior paint which retains a deep, mirror-like luster entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. The interior is equally immaculate; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with no visible wear, and the cabin still retains its original factory scent. Every technological feature and electronic component functions with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a comprehensive, documented service history and strictly original parts. It delivers a tight, responsive driving experience identical to the day it was first delivered. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to acquire a turn-key masterpiece that requires absolutely nothing but a new home.

Presenting an exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in superlative condition, having undergone a rigorous multi-point verification to ensure it meets the highest standards of aesthetic and mechanical integrity. The exterior finish is flawless, complemented by an interior that retains its original factory freshness. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine specimen.
